title: ATOMIC: --include-smells flag + Panic-emission filter step + 2 new tests

helper_added.name: is_smell_finding

tests_added.name: test_vulnargs_run_default_suppresses_panic

≥1 UnsafeCode finding still emerges (regression guard against accidental over-gating)

tests_added.name: test_vulnargs_run_include_smells_emits_panic
asserts: ≥1 Panic finding emerges when include_smells=true (legacy emission round-trip)
